# Vendored libraries

- `opentype.min.js` — opentype.js 1.3.4, MIT License. https://github.com/opentypejs/opentype.js
- `clipper.js` — Javascript Clipper 6.4.2.2 (clipper-lib), Boost Software License 1.0. https://sourceforge.net/projects/jsclipper/
- `earcut.min.js` — earcut 2.2.4, ISC License. https://github.com/mapbox/earcut
- `three.module.js` / `OrbitControls.js` — three.js 0.165.0, MIT License. https://github.com/mrdoob/three

# Bundled fonts (`../fonts/`)

All bundled fonts are licensed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1 — per-font license
texts are in `../fonts/licenses/`. Commercial use, modification (subsetting), bundling
and outline conversion are permitted; the fonts may not be sold by themselves.

The served files in `fonts/` are subsets (kana + ASCII + common symbols) generated by
`scripts/subset_fonts.py` from the full originals kept in `fonts/src/`. Titan One
declares the Reserved Font Name "Titan", so its subset's internal name is changed to
"Titan One Subset" per OFL §3.

- Cherry Bomb One (Google Fonts)
- Potta One (Google Fonts)
- Mochiy Pop One (Google Fonts)
- Kiwi Maru Medium (Google Fonts)
- Zen Maru Gothic Bold (Google Fonts)
- DotGothic16 (Google Fonts)
- Bagel Fat One (Google Fonts)
- Baloo 2 ExtraBold (Google Fonts, static instance)
- Titan One (Google Fonts; RFN "Titan" → subset renamed)
- Grandstander Bold (Etcetera Type Co.)

NOT bundled: fonts the user loads via the「フォントを読み込む」feature stay in the
user's browser (IndexedDB) and are never part of this repository or the served app.
カタカナボーイ in particular forbids web redistribution ("WEBや雑誌、他メディアへの
転載・収録はお断り") and must never be committed here.
